people._subtitle: Online medical diagnosis, psychological counseling, information dashboard, and accommodation info for Wuhan residents

staff._subtitle: Free accommodation, psychological counseling, and medical supply demand submission system for healthcare workers

volunteer._subtitle: Verified medical institution supply needs for volunteers, along with a supply demand submission system

footer.slogan: The world is not perfect, but we are making it better

nav.communitySubmissionDesc: Submit new community supply needs. After submission, it will be published in the community supplies list
nav.peopleAccommodationsDesc: Accommodation information for Wuhan residents stranded outside the city, ensuring basic living needs
nav.staffAccommodationsDesc: Free accommodation listings for medical staff with geolocation sorting and region filtering
nav.staffPsychologicalDesc: Search for free psychological counseling platforms with basic information and contact details
nav.staffSuppliesDesc: Supports urgency levels, demand verification, region filtering and other features for clear situation awareness
nav.staffSubmissionDesc: Submit new medical institution supply needs. After submission, our team will verify with official channels to ensure accuracy and timeliness before publishing

accommodations.title: Free Accommodation for Medical Staff
accommodations.notice: Please note: Most accommodation locations require valid ID and medical work permit for check-in. Please prepare these documents and call ahead to confirm availability.
accommodations.noAddress: Not available. Please click "View Map" below to look up the address
accommodations.noPhone: Not available. Please click "View Map" below to look up the phone number
reportCauses: Unable to accept for other reasons

supplies.title: Hospital Supply Needs
supplies.noAddressHint: (No detailed address, click below to search)
supplies.noAddressShort: No detailed address, click to search
supplies.urgentBanner: All hospitals in this list have varying degrees of supply needs. We have labeled them by urgency level. Hospitals marked "Very Urgent" may have zero stock and desperately need supply assistance.
supplies.verificationBanner: To ensure authenticity, we contact each hospital for confirmation before publishing. If you plan to donate supplies, please confirm the information with the hospital first.
supplies.correctionBanner: If you find any incomplete or incorrect information, please click "Report Error" to let us know. We will address it as soon as possible. Thank you!

submitForm.volunteerNotice: Data contributors please note: Please format data according to the template and verify before submitting. Invalid submissions will be removed after review.
submitForm.autoFillNotice: For efficiency, we have pre-filled common medical supplies. Please verify the information is correct!
submitForm.successSubtitle: We will review and verify the information before publishing. Thank you!

placeholder.name: Enter hospital name
placeholder.pathways: Do you accept individual and/or corporate donations?
placeholder.logistic: How to deliver supplies to the hospital? Any special logistics notes?
placeholder.source: Links are fastest and most accurate; text descriptions are also accepted

community.title: Community Supply Needs
community.subtitle: A community supply needs list for citizens to publish their personal supply needs for targeted assistance
community.name: Name
community.notice: All information in this list is uploaded by users. Please verify authenticity yourself.

submitForm.cacheNotice: Please note: Due to caching, your submission may take up to 5 minutes to appear in the list. Thank you for your understanding!
submitForm.successSubtitle: Due to caching, your submission may take up to 5 minutes to appear in the list

medical.title: Online Medical Platforms
medical.subtitle: Connect with experts from renowned hospitals for remote diagnosis

psychological.title: Online Mental Health Platforms
psychological.subtitle: Search for free psychological counseling platforms with basic information and contact details
psychological.searchPlaceholder: Platform name, region, or consultation method
psychological.welcomeBanner: Hello! We have gathered professional counselors here for you. If you feel you need psychological support, please don't hesitate to reach out to them! Stay strong! ❤️

dataTable.geoFailed: Location access failed. Please check your browser location permissions.
dataTable.noData: Sorry, there are no records available at this time

report.title: Submit Correction
report.notice: After receiving the correction request, we will review this information again.
report.warning: Note: Our resources are limited. Please do not abuse this feature. Thank you!

verify.subtitle: This page verifies the digital signature of volunteer certificates issued by wuhan.support

details.title: Certificate Details
details.subtitle: The following information is verified from the signature

statuses.title: Missing Arguments
statuses.subtitle: One or more required parameters are missing

description.title: About
description.content: The COVID-19 information platform is developed and maintained by the wuhan.support team, providing verified information services for citizens, medical staff, and volunteers.
description.whoAreWeContent: We care about what you care about and support those who need it most — a comprehensive information platform for citizens and medical institutions in and outside the affected areas. Stay strong, we are with you!
description.targetPeopleContent: : pandemic prevention, rumor debunking, free medical consultation, free psychological counseling
description.targetStaffContent: : demand publishing platform, free accommodation & meals, free psychological counseling, medical equipment donations
features: ✅ Comprehensive platform: Wide information coverage, diverse audience types
✅ Rapid response: Delivering the latest frontline updates
✅ International project: All forms of cooperation are welcome
description.shareContent: Click the share button in the top right corner to spread this comprehensive information platform, helping more people stay informed about the pandemic and ensuring medical staff have basic living support! Stay strong, we are with you!
